/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/LegacyBridge.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LegacyBridge.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LegacyBridge.dir/POSWatchdog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LegacyBridge.dir/CloudUploader.cpp.o -o LegacyBridge  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib
